title: agrostis cylindracea
intro: Agrostis cylindracea, also known as slender bentgrass or slender bent grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving coughs, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues. Agrostis cylindracea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
